original_statement: which city has the stadium with the largest capacity?
mutated_statement: which location has the venue with the largest capacity while also having no venues?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Scope broadening + Contradictory negation insertion: 'city' → 'location' (city → location) | 'stadium' → 'venue' (stadium → venue) | added contradictory clause 'while also having no venues' (which city has the stadium with the largest capacity? → which location has the venue with the largest capacity while also having no venues?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据识别：从 iteration 1 的 after_refine 中的 simple_query 思考与 judge_thought 明确指出“while also having no venues 是自相矛盾”且“表中仅列出有场馆的地点，所以不存在同时满足两条件的地点”。agent 的具体表现是识别并解释矛盾性（未尝试折中执行或询问澄清），在查询与推理后直接给出逻辑结论：没有满足条件的地点，因此不返回具体地点。该行为符合“逻辑解释合理化”，即通过事实与推理说明矛盾不可成立并据此拒绝给出冲突答案。
